    "Missing hanger nails in designated connector holes (empty holes observed)."

  "actions": [
    "Install the correct size and type of approved hanger nails in all empty connector holes per manufacturer specifications before closeout."

  "rationale": "Simpson Strong-Tie manufacturer specifications and the International Residential Code (IRC) require all nail holes in joist hangers and connectors to be filled with the specified fasteners to achieve the rated load capacity.
